idea-plugin.name: CodeAgent
idea-plugin.description:
Ship real work without leaving the IDE.

CodeAgent is a project-aware coding agent for JetBrains IDEs. It combines a model-driven engineering loop with repository context, visible tool execution, and native review so you can move from request to verified change in one workspace.

Agent runs you can follow

Watch streamed responses, tool progress, approvals, tasks, subagents, checkpoints, and changed files in one continuous conversation.

Context that stays current

ContextEngine indexes the project, synchronizes incremental changes automatically, and retrieves the files and symbols each task actually needs.

Changes that stay under your control

Read, search, edit, run terminals, inspect diagnostics, work with Git, attach images, and render Mermaid diagrams with approval policies and JetBrains-native Diff review.

Built for long-running engineering: per-conversation model selection, a 256K context budget, automatic compaction at 80%, durable threads, and live backend, model, and ContextEngine health checks.
